title: clethra occidentalis
intro: Clethra occidentalis, also known as the coastal sweetpea or coastal clethra, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of Clethra occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections, attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Clethra occidentalis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Clethra occidentalis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
